title: Create Bookforge directory structure and initialize first task:
job:
Create Bookforge directory structure and initialize first task:

1. Create Bookforge/ directory with exact trailing slash
2. Create required subdirectories: Bookforge/plans/, Bookforge/roadmap/, Bookforge/tasks/, Bookforge/data/
3. Create initial files:
   - Bookforge/plans/popebot_execution.md
   - Bookforge/roadmap/99_execution_order.md
   - Bookforge/tasks/phase_0.yaml
4. Initialize first task in phase_0.yaml with status "todo"
5. Validate directory structure
6. Commit changes
7. Open pull request to merge into main
